---
title: "Retail Sales Analysis (SQL)"
---

## Business Question
[cite_start]Which products perform best, and what patterns can be identified to support better stock and sales decisions? [cite: 36, 41]

## SQL Implementation
[cite_start]Below is the query used to aggregate total sales by category to optimize inventory: 

```sql
-- Aggregating total sales by category
SELECT product_category, SUM(sales_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM sales_transactions
GROUP BY product_category
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
